flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Louisiana Tech University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Louisiana Tech University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (39.2% → 44.5%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Louisiana Tech University are 12% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($52.3k vs $46.8k).
